description_long: This is a stylized doll of a young girl with large, expressive blue eyes and long, gradient pink-to-purple hair styled in twin ponytails tied with yellow ribbons. She wears a white beret, a white blouse with puffed sleeves, and a blue pinafore dress with a flared skirt and pink trim. The doll is depicted in a dynamic kneeling pose, with one arm extended forward and the other bent, holding a small black object. Her shoes are blue with white socks, and her facial features are detailed with a lively, open-mouthed expression. The overall design is reminiscent of Japanese anime or manga characters, with a playful and whimsical aesthetic.
description: A stylized anime-inspired doll of a young girl with long pink hair in pigtails, wearing a blue pinafore dress, white beret, and blue shoes, posed dynamically with expressive features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's expressive face, blue dress, white beret, and both arms, with one hand holding a small black object.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the flowing twin ponytails, and the layered skirt, with the left arm extended forward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the beret, the full length of the twin ponytails, the back of the blue dress, and both shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the right profile, the dynamic pose of the legs, and the right arm bent with the hand visible.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll wears a blue pinafore dress with a flared skirt and pink trim over a white blouse with puffed sleeves, paired with a white beret and blue shoes with white socks. The style is reminiscent of Japanese anime fashion, featuring playful, pastel colors and decorative yellow hair ribbons.
attribute_pose: The doll is kneeling with one leg bent under the body and the other extended to the side, the torso slightly twisted. The left arm is extended forward with the hand open, while the right arm is bent, holding a small black object. The head is tilted slightly upward and to the left.
attribute_facial_expression: The doll has a lively, open-mouthed smile with wide, bright eyes and slightly raised eyebrows, conveying excitement or joy.
attribute_hair_style: Long, straight pink hair with purple tips, styled in twin ponytails tied with yellow ribbons, and a few loose strands framing the face.
